definitions.text: The terminal point of something in space or time.
examples: At the end of the garden there was a beautiful fountain.
At the end of the story, the main characters fall in love.

definitions.text: The cessation of an effort, activity, state, or motion.
examples: Is there no end to this madness?
He met a terrible end in the jungle.
I hope the end comes quickly.
Is this movie never going to end?
The lesson will end when the bell rings.

definitions.text: To conclude; to bring something to an end.
examples: The orchestra ended with a performance of Dvořák.
The referee blew the whistle to end the game.
